headline: Here is Why Citigroup (C) is One of the Most Profitable Value Stocks to Invest In Now
summary: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) is one of the most profitable value stocks to invest in now. On June 11, Citi launched a market-first Digital Depositary Receipts program to provide private companies and investors with a more transparent, direct, and efficient way to access private market equity. By serving as both the single issuer and custodian, Citi […]

headline: S&P affirms U.S. sovereign rating at AA+, maintains stable outlook
summary: Investing.com -- S&P Global Ratings affirmed the U.S.’s long-term sovereign credit rating at AA+ with a stable outlook, Bloomberg reported on Friday, citing the country’s resilient economy and expectations that fiscal deficits will remain elevated but stable.

headline: Citigroup (C) Lifts Dividend And Unveils $30 Billion Share Buyback Plan
summary: Citigroup (NYSE:C) plans to increase its dividend following its successful completion of the Federal Reserve's 2026 stress test. The bank also authorized a multi year US$30b share repurchase program, signaling a renewed focus on shareholder returns. Citigroup is one of the largest global banks, with operations spanning consumer banking, institutional services, and markets businesses. The latest capital return plans arrive as large U.S. banks continue to adapt to evolving regulatory...
